Our contacts 

Transforming Your Vision into Reality with Expert Home Design Solutions.

Creating Custom, Innovative, and Sustainable Home Designs for Every Lifestyle.

About Us

At Odos Designs, we believe that every home has a story to tell. Our passion lies in transforming those stories into beautiful, functional, and sustainable living spaces. With a team of skilled designers, architects, and project managers, we specialize in creating custom home designs that reflect the unique tastes and lifestyles of our clients.

Founded with the vision of delivering high-quality, personalized design solutions, Odos Designs has been at the forefront of the industry, building a reputation for innovation, creativity, and attention to detail. We understand that designing a home is more than just about aesthetics—it’s about creating a space where memories are made, comfort is prioritized, and every detail enhances the way you live.

Our approach is collaborative. From the initial consultation to the final touches, we work closely with you to ensure that your vision is brought to life. Whether you’re building your dream home from scratch, renovating an existing space, or looking for design inspiration, we are here to guide you every step of the way. We believe in open communication, transparency, and building long-lasting relationships with our clients.

At Odos Designs, we don’t just design houses—we create homes that inspire, energize, and stand the test of time. Our team is committed to making your design journey enjoyable and stress-free, ensuring that your new space is not just beautiful, but also practical and sustainable for years to come.

What We Do

At Odos Designs, we specialize in creating beautiful, functional, and sustainable home designs that cater to the unique needs of each client. Our comprehensive range of services is designed to transform your vision into reality, whether you’re building a new home, renovating an existing one, or enhancing the interior of your space. Here’s a breakdown of the key services we offer:

1. Custom Home Design
We specialize in creating bespoke, one-of-a-kind home designs that perfectly match your vision and lifestyle. From contemporary to traditional, our designs blend aesthetic beauty with practicality. We focus on creating spaces that not only look amazing but also enhance your everyday living experience. Whether it’s a cozy cottage or a grand mansion, our team ensures that every detail is crafted to your exact specifications.

2. Interior Design
Our interior design services are focused on enhancing the beauty and functionality of the interior spaces of your home. We work with you to choose color schemes, furniture, lighting, and accessories that reflect your personal style while maximizing comfort and practicality. Whether you're looking to redesign a single room or your entire home, we make sure the design flows seamlessly, creating a cohesive and inviting atmosphere.

3. Home Renovations & Additions
Whether your current home is in need of a facelift or you're looking to add extra space, we offer comprehensive renovation and addition services. We help you reimagine existing spaces, integrating modern designs while preserving the character and charm of your home. Whether it's a kitchen remodel, expanding your living room, or adding a second story, we approach each project with the same commitment to quality and creativity.

Our Team

At Odos Designs, our strength lies in the talent, passion, and experience of our team. Each member brings a unique set of skills to the table, and together, we work towards one goal: creating homes that perfectly align with our clients' visions and needs. Here's a closer look at the core members of our team:

Sarah Thompson

Founder & Lead Designer

John Miller

Senior Architect

Emily Rodriguez

Interior Design Specialist

Michael Davis 

Project Manager

Our Mission

At Odos Designs, our mission is to create homes that inspire and enrich the lives of those who live in them. We believe that a home is not just a place to live, but a reflection of who you are, your values, and your dreams. Our goal is to design spaces that are not only visually stunning but also functional, sustainable, and truly personal to each of our clients.

We are committed to:

1. Crafting Personalized Designs
Every client is unique, and so is every home we design. We listen carefully to our clients’ ideas, needs, and aspirations, and work closely with them to create tailored designs that perfectly align with their lifestyles and tastes. Our team is dedicated to making sure that every detail of the home, from the layout to the smallest design elements, truly reflects the individual character and vision of our clients.

2. Embracing Innovation and Creativity
We aim to push the boundaries of design by incorporating the latest trends, materials, and technologies. Creativity is at the heart of everything we do, and we strive to deliver innovative solutions that transform spaces into something extraordinary. Whether it’s a cutting-edge design or a unique feature that adds character to a home, we are always looking for ways to enhance the overall aesthetic and experience of each project.

3. Promoting Sustainability and Eco-Conscious Design
We are dedicated to reducing the environmental impact of the homes we design. Our mission is to create spaces that are not only beautiful and functional but also eco-friendly and energy-efficient. By using sustainable materials, energy-saving technologies, and green building practices, we aim to help our clients reduce their carbon footprint while creating a home that is both stylish and responsible.

Who Our Clients Are

At Odos Designs, we work with a diverse range of clients, each with their own unique needs and aspirations for their living spaces. Our clients include homeowners, developers, real estate professionals, and commercial entities who trust us to bring their visions to life. Here’s a closer look at the different groups of people and organizations we serve:

Homeowners

Our primary clients are homeowners looking to create their ideal living spaces. Whether they’re building a new home, renovating an existing one, or updating their interiors, we work closely with each homeowner to design a space that reflects their personality and lifestyle. We understand that every family or individual has specific needs and preferences, and we tailor our designs to meet those unique requirements. Our homeowners value creative, functional, and aesthetically pleasing designs that make their homes a place they love to live in.

Real Estate Developers

Real estate developers often come to us for assistance in creating homes that are both attractive and marketable. We collaborate with developers to design residential communities, multi-family units, and luxury homes that appeal to a wide range of buyers. Our expertise in designing spaces that combine both beauty and functionality ensures that the properties stand out in the market. We help developers create properties that offer high resale value and meet the needs of potential buyers.

Architects & Designers

In addition to individual homeowners, we frequently collaborate with architects and other design professionals to bring larger-scale residential and commercial projects to life. Whether it’s partnering with an architect on a custom home design or helping interior designers perfect the details of a space, we pride ourselves on working alongside other professionals to ensure a cohesive and exceptional result.

Our Advantages

At Odos Designs, we understand that choosing the right design team is crucial for bringing your vision to life. Here’s why we stand out from the competition:

Customized Design Solutions

Every home we design is unique. We don’t rely on templates or one-size-fits-all designs. Our team takes the time to understand your specific needs, preferences, and lifestyle to create a personalized design that reflects your personality and functional requirements.

 Expert Team of Professionals

Our team is made up of seasoned architects, interior designers, project managers, and sustainability experts, all with years of experience in the home design industry. We are committed to delivering top-notch service, creative solutions, and attention to detail in every project.

Focus on Sustainability

We believe in designing homes that are not only beautiful but also environmentally responsible. We integrate sustainable practices into every stage of the design process, from energy-efficient layouts to the use of eco-friendly materials, ensuring that your home is both stylish and eco-conscious.

Testimonials

Linda W.

"Collaborating with Odos Designs was a fantastic experience. Their team is incredibly talented, and their ability to combine form and function in their designs is impressive. We worked together on a large residential project, and the result was nothing short of stunning. Their professionalism and dedication to delivering top-quality designs are unmatched."

Rachel D.

"Odos Designs helped us create a functional yet beautiful space for our family business. The team worked closely with us, providing expert advice every step of the way. They made sure our business needs were met while maintaining a welcoming and elegant atmosphere. We’re so pleased with how everything turned out!"

Mark T.

"Working with Odos was a great experience. Their team’s professionalism and attention to detail were exceptional. They not only delivered a beautiful design but also made the entire process seamless from start to finish. The result was a home that both we and our clients love, and we wouldn’t hesitate to work with them again on future projects."

1. How much does a custom home design cost?

Cost depends on the size and complexity of the project. We offer customized quotes after the initial consultation.

2. How long does it take to complete a design?

Typically, a custom design can take between 4-12 weeks, depending on the scope of the project.

3. Do you offer interior design services?

Yes, we offer comprehensive interior design services to enhance the aesthetic and functionality of your home.

4. Can you work with my existing space?

Absolutely! We specialize in renovations and additions, transforming existing spaces into something new and exciting.

5. What is your design process like?

We start with a consultation to understand your needs, followed by design sketches, revisions, and final approval. Throughout the process, you are involved to ensure the final design reflects your vision.
